notes: PPMd K=6 in pure Python. Spec's early-abort guard fired: first 10 MB of train took 43.8 s (> 40 s threshold), so training locked in after 10 M bytes (1.56 M trie nodes) instead of the targeted 60 M. Val char-acc came in at 0.6300, below the 0.70 floor (DQ). Training energy was very low at 633 J (~80x under the 51.7 kJ transformer baseline) and wall time 44.5 s — well inside budget. No execution errors.
